items.title: Mick Cronin Ejects His Own Player For Committing Hard Foul in UCLA's Loss to MSU
items.description: Mick Cronin found a new way to express frustration, ejecting his own player during UCLA's blowout loss to Michigan State on Tuesday.

items.title: College Football Offseason Buzz: Michigan Loses 2027 Quarterback Commit
items.description: The college football news cycle never stops. With that in mind, here's a tracker of offseason buzz across the sport.

items.title: Villanova Outlasts Xavier in Overtime
items.description: Villanova earns sixth straight win with overtime victory against Xavier on Tuesday.

items.title: 4 Takeaways From Michigan's Big Ten Win Over Purdue
items.description: Elliot Cadeau scored 17 points in Michigan's 91-80 win over Purdue, the Wolverines' 21st victory of the season by double digits.

items.title: Men's College Basketball 2025-26 Undefeated Teams Tracker: Miami (OH) Humming
items.description: Only one men's college basketball team remains undefeated in the 2025-2026 season.
